items.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
items.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

items.title: Fed leaves rates unchanged, says geopolitical uncertainty clouds outlook
items.summary: The effect on energy prices from the Iran war will impact the economy, but the size and scope of the macroeconomic shock are still unknown.

items.title: Kalshi CEO fires back against Arizona criminal charges as ‘total overstep‘
items.summary: The prediction markets co-founder said that the company would “abide by court decisions“ but signaled that the charges were based partly on political bias and media attention.

items.title: Algorand Foundation Cuts 25% of Staff as Crypto Industry Layoffs Grow
items.summary: The organization behind layer-1 blockchain Algorand laid off 25% of its staff due to macroeconomic uncertainty and lower crypto prices.

items.title: SEC approves Nasdaq's move to support tokenized securities trading
items.summary: The SEC’s approval lets Nasdaq test blockchain-based versions of stocks that trade and settle like traditional shares.

items.title: Trump White House Registers Aliens.gov—Is the UFO File Drop Imminent?
items.summary: The White House registered aliens.gov, a month after Trump ordered the release of all government UAP and UFO files following a viral Obama moment.

items.title: Fairshake's $10 million Illinois misfire marks first big hitch in crypto political surge
items.summary: The crypto sector's leading political action committee devoted more than 5% of its war chest trying to defeat a Senate candidate who just won her primary.

items.title: From Coinbase to Ripple: The Biggest Crypto Cases Dumped by Trump's SEC
items.summary: Under President Trump, the SEC has backed down from nearly all its fights with crypto firms. These are the biggest cases ended so far.

items.title: SEC Chair explains why NFTs fall outside of securities laws
items.summary: Paul Atkins says nonfungible tokens are typically collectibles, not investment contracts, as the agency outlines new categories of digital assets outside securities laws.

items.title: Bitcoin sinks below $71,000, stocks close at session lows, as 2026 Fed rate cut hopes fade further
items.summary: Fed chair Jerome Powell said rising energy prices are feeding into the inflation outlook, but "nobody knows" yet how lasting the impact will be.

items.title: Polymarket acquires Brahma to scale blockchain trading infrastructure
items.summary: "Building reliable infrastructure across blockchain networks and traditional financial rails is hard — there are no shortcuts,” said Polymarket CEO Shayne Coplan.

items.title: FTX Recovery Trust to distribute $2.2B to creditors in March
items.summary: The fourth round of reimbursements to creditors and former clients of the failed crypto exchange since February 2025 brings the total paid to about $10 billion.

items.title: Crypto Fear and Greed rebounds off extreme lows as traders re-enter
items.summary: The Crypto Fear and Greed Index just ended a 48-day stretch in the “extreme fear” zone, signalling improving sentiment among investors. Will fresh capital inflows reignite the bull market?

items.title: ‘We are so close this time‘ — Senator Lummis on market structure bill
items.summary: The Wyoming Republican said that the main issue holding up passage of the bill was stablecoin yield, while adding that she believed a provision on DeFi had been ”put to bed.”

items.title: Sam Bankman-Fried's bankrupt exchange FTX set to repay creditors $2.2 billion this month
items.summary: The trust handling the bankruptcy proceedings detailed how much will be distributed to creditors and claimants at the end of March.

items.title: Kalshi co-founder fights back against Arizona’s ‘overstep’ in what a lawyer calls a federal-state turf war
items.summary: Arizona has filed 20 criminal counts against Kalshi, a prediction market platform, accusing it of operating an illegal gambling business and offering election wagering in the state.

items.title: Fed holds rates amid higher inflation outlook: Bitcoin bounces to $72K
items.summary: Bitcoin’s pre-FOMC sell-off eased as the US Federal Reserve's choice to leave interest rates unchanged was followed by a swift bounce in BTC price.

items.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Waver as Fed Holds Interest Rates Steady
items.summary: Inflation has exceeded the central bank’s 2% target for nearly five years, but the Fed held rates firm again as Bitcoin and Ethereum wobbled.

items.title: Federal Reserve holds policy steady as Iran war adds to growth and inflation concerns
items.summary: Bitcoin remained sharply lower for the session following the expected decision by the U.S. central bank.

items.title: Myriad Traders Slash Spring Rally Chances as Bitcoin, Ethereum Slide
items.summary: A hotter-than-expected inflation reading pushed crypto prices lower Wednesday—slashing the chances of a broad spring breakout.

items.title: S&P Dow Jones licenses S&P 500 perpetual futures for Hyperliquid
items.summary: The new derivative allows eligible non-US users to trade leveraged exposure to the index around the clock using official data on a decentralized platform.

items.title: ‘Rich Dad, Poor Dad’ author says ‘pin is near’ on TradFi ‘bubble burst:’ Predicts $750K Bitcoin
items.summary: Author and personal finance educator Robert Kiyosaki says Bitcoin is going to $750,000, but there's a catch.

items.title: Crypto Market Structure Bill to Face Key Vote in April and Must Pass by May, Senators Say
items.summary: Sen. Bernie Moreno said if the Clarity Act isn’t passed by May, “digital asset legislation will not pass for the foreseeable future.”

items.title: The era of cheap money is over as the Iran war creates a permanent 'inflation floor'
items.summary: The Iran war is creating a permanent inflation floor that could end the era of cheap money and expose the fragility of global energy markets.

items.title: Bhutan offloads an additional $72.3M Bitcoin amid market downturn
items.summary: After the Kingdom of Bhutan's BTC reserve peaked in October 2024, when it held more than 13,000 coins, it has been pared to just 4,400 Bitcoin.

items.title: Citi Downgrades Crypto Exchange Gemini After Cutting Bitcoin, Ethereum Price Targets
items.summary: Gemini stock (GEMI) fell 16% on Wednesday following the downgrade and a broader market dip, after Citi cut its Bitcoin and Ethereum targets.

items.title: Bitcoin tests fresh decoupling trade as tech correlation drops to 2018 lows
items.summary: BTC price is vastly outperforming the tech-heavy Nasdaq index amid the US–Iran war, but its risks of crashing toward $51,000 persist.

items.summary: Senator Cynthia Lummis, at the center of legislative talks, said the discussion is down to nuance and the bill will finally emerge from her committee in April.

items.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum Slip on Inflation Surprise as Oil Prices Jump
items.summary: Bitcoin fell alongside U.S. stocks after the world's largest gas field came under attack amid hotter-than-expected inflation data.

items.title: Bitcoin hash rate is tumbling as Iran war lifts energy prices
items.summary: A falling hash rate and the resultant pressure on miners could signal another potential capitulation phase, which could push prices down further

items.summary: Ties to the crypto industry became a vector for attack in a recent Democratic primary election in the state of Illinois.

items.summary: The UK has a unique opportunity to merge the best of the EU’s MiCA framework and the US GENIUS Act, Circle’s Dante Disparte told the House of Lords committee on Wednesday.

items.summary: Discover how global enterprises are moving corporate treasury onchain. Learn how Solana and Fireblocks enable 24/7 liquidity, instant global payouts, and yield generation using stablecoins.

items.title: FATF 報告書が示すステーブルコイン規制の転換点：流通市場モニタリングの時代へ
items.summary: ※この記事は自動翻訳されています。正確な内容につきましては原文をご参照ください。 要約 84% という現実： ステーブルコインは今や、不正な暗号資産トランザクションの 84% を占めています。普及の拡大に伴い、ステーブルコインに特化したコンプライアンスが喫緊の規制課題となっています。 「流通市場」の時代： 規制の焦点は、入出金の監視にとどまりません。FATF は、個人ウォレットを介した P2P トランザクションを含むステーブルコインのライフサイクル全体の監視を求めており、発…
